SUBJECT: Just found another gift under the tree

convertlinks

Just when you thought all the gifts were done
with for a year, we have a huge gift for you
and your business...

Maybe you missed this in all the hustle and
bustle on the 24th, but we released our
Stomper Scrutinizer software... and it's not
going to cost you hundreds of dollars per
month.

In fact it won't cost you anything. It's
completely free.

And you can get it right now here.

Now I don't know about you, but I often
wonder how I can turn more of the visitors to
my sites into customers. Wouldn't it be great
to have some type of x-ray vision into what
they are thinking when they hit my sites?

Well here's the thing... I'm lucky enough to
have some crazy-smart people on my team - and
I guess they got sick of hearing me whine
about not knowing what my visitors are
thinking... because they built me a tool that
gives me the answers to those questions.

The name of that tool is Stomper Scrutinizer.

And you know what?

If you know exactly what your visitors are
looking at (and thinking about), then you end
up making a lot more sales.

Funny how that works, eh?

Well, after everything was done and the
software was ready for release, well... we
had to decide how much to charge for it...

It seemed like a monthly subscription plan at
$197 to $297 per month would be a slam dunk.
We figured that as soon as people saw their
conversions going through the roof... well,
this would be the easiest sale in the world.

But then I had a stroke of inspiration... or
maybe madness...

And I decided to give it away.

This is the deal, there's something big
coming (it's only a few days away, but I'm
not quite ready to reveal it yet), and the
bottom line is that you are going to NEED the
exact type of web site "x-ray vision" that
Scrutinizer gives you.

Here's the link to get the Scrutinizer software.

And remember, it's free and there are no
strings attached. I will likely end up
pulling this software down soon, but I will
leave it up for at least a week.


best regards,
Andy Jenkins

P.S. Just in case you missed exactly WHY you
need to be to be able to get inside your web
site visitor's brain (and eyes), then go
watch our Going Natural video... the stuff in
that video is going to shock you. Trust me,
you have NO IDEA what's going on with your
visitors. 

Here's the link to that video.

You're about to find out why more of those
visitors aren't becoming customers and
clients.
